mission.title: kyverno: [Bug][helm] "bitnami/kubectl" will soon be suject to bitnami registration/license
mission.description: [Bug][helm] "bitnami/kubectl" will soon be suject to bitnami registration/license. This issue affects 11+ users.

steps.title: Identify kyverno troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your kyverno deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno -n kyverno --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review kyverno configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kyverno configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno
kubectl get configmap -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kyverno
```
`bitnami/kubectl` repository will not be freely available from 28/08/2025.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Bug][helm] "bitnami/kubectl" will soon be suject to…
steps.description:
This PR updates helm hooks to use `rancher/kubectl` instead of `bitnami/kubectl` and removes unused hooks
- Closes https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/10614
- Closes https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/13683
- Relates to https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/13717 (could potentially
```yaml
webhooksCleanup:
  image:
    repository: bitnamilegacy/kubectl
policyReportsCleanup:
  image:
    repository: bitnamilegacy/kubectl
```

steps.title: Upgrade kyverno to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade kyverno:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade kyverno kyverno/kyverno --namespace kyverno
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kyverno
helm list -n kyverno
```

steps.title: Confirm [Bug][helm] "bitnami/kubectl" will soon be suject… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno -n kyverno --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n kyverno --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
This PR updates helm hooks to use `rancher/kubectl` instead of `bitnami/kubectl` and removes unused hooks
- Closes https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/10614
- Closes https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/13683
- Relates to https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/13717 (could potentially close)

### Proof Manifests

1.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kyverno installed or the issue environment reproducible.
